items.title: Mammootty-Mohanlal movie ‘Patriot’ reaches cinemas as fans await an exciting re-union

items.title: Fertiliser boss says war puts 10 billion meals a week at risk
items.summary: A shortage of fertiliser due to the Iran conflict could reduce crop yields and push prices higher, says the boss of Yara.
